markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the AirOps engagement for Intoxalock's DUI.org content strategy and production](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Primary goal: Rapidly scale relevant content for DUI.org to capture top-of-funnel traffic and nurture leads](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [Target: 24,000 unique monthly visitors to DUI.org by end of Q2 2024 (currently \~500 organic sessions/month)](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Content focus: State-specific DUI information, aiming for high accuracy and authority](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Challenges: Legal review process, sourcing accurate state-specific details, competing with attorney websites](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

## Topics

### Project Objectives

  - [Create authoritative DUI-related content to capture organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Position DUI.org as a trusted resource for DUI offenders and their families](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Drive more leads and installations for Intoxalock's products (IIDs, insurance)](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [Improve rankings for DUI-related terms (currently strong only for product-specific keywords)](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)

### Target Audience

  - [Primary: First-time DUI offenders seeking information post-arrest](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Secondary: Family members researching on behalf of offenders](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Characteristics: Likely lower income, younger, without attorney representation](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [Emotional state: Confused, overwhelmed, seeking guidance on next steps](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Focus on state-specific DUI information and processes](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Create personalized user experiences based on individual situations](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Develop content addressing common questions and concerns of DUI offenders](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Aim to outrank attorney websites by providing comprehensive, user-friendly information](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)

### Production Process

  - [Utilize AirOps platform for content ideation, creation, and management](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Implement legal review process within the workflow (likely via Google Docs initially)](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Publish approved content to WordPress-based DUI.org (new site launching later in the year)](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=2781.0)
  - [Leverage AI for content generation, with human editing and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=2272.0)

### Challenges and Bottlenecks

  - [Legal review process for ensuring accuracy and compliance](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=2093.0)
  - [Sourcing and verifying state-specific DUI information](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Competing with well-established attorney websites in search results](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [Updating outdated content and tracking down internal product information](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=2596.0)

### Integration and Tools

  - [AirOps platform for content management and workflow](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [WordPress CMS for DUI.org](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=2781.0)
  - [Potential use of Reddit Pro for audience insights and topic ideation](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
  - [Custom scoring system for keyword relevance and intent analysis](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=2935.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Set up Slack channel for team communication](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Provide access to AirOps instance for Intoxalock team](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=3112.0)
  - [Share existing research, guidelines, and documentation with Grotex Labs](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [Schedule deeper dive sessions for specific areas (e.g., content publishing process)](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=2825.0)
  - [Establish weekly sync meetings to track progress and address issues](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=3134.0)
  - [Begin keyword research and content ideation process](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [Develop and refine legal review workflow within AirOps platform](https://fathom.video/share/W9E3ZJ8pyv2bWk-Y3X6h3Rg8G8Be2Qyc?tab=summary&timestamp=2825.0)
